description: An if/when/unless condition is not represented as a graph structure.
example: Outside building hours or projector requested condition.

description: Only-after, before, or after constraints are missing or only implied.
example: Payment charged only after inventory availability is verified.

description: Exception branches or alternative choices are absent or incomplete.
example: Projector unavailable -> reserve room without projector or choose another time.

description: A predicate is present but a required target/object/scope argument is missing.
example: Submission record linked, but not linked to every team member.

description: Team-level, each/every, selected, or specific-member scope is not explicit.
example: Team grade shown to each team member.

description: A not/except/not separately constraint is missing.
example: Late status not applied separately to each team member.

description: Ontology-compatible output uses useful vocabulary but is too sparse, compact, or unbalanced for reliable direct comparison.
example: Ontology graph captures a term but misses the version-level change relation.
